name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.48: image migration now also sources planogram bay images. Machines display catalog imgUrl OR the planogram bay image, so products whose catalog row had no imgUrl kept serving Weimi URLs while the report claimed nothing was left. Migration now covers those, stubs catalog rows for planogram-only goodsIds, and reports how many came from the planogram. Cumulative over v5.47.
